description: I was responsible for creating and editing images, vectors and production of advertising products. This thought me a lot about how a product comes to life and how to work with clients since it was my first work experience.

header: Developer for the app Keywords, TV/Radio content search engine.
description:
• Contributed to the development of a React-based frontend and integrated it with the existing platform..
• Refactored and exposed Django backend functionalities as RESTful APIs to support the new frontend architecture.
• Assisted in maintaining and debugging the current application, ensuring stability and performance.

header: Developer for the Keywords app, a TV/Radio content search engine, internal tools and client-facing applications.
description:
• Designed and maintained Python services integrated with Elasticsearch.
• Developed and enhanced a React + TypeScript frontend, improving usability and maintainability.
• Containerized and managed microservices using Docker to support a modular and scalable architecture. 
• Maintained and improved existing applications by fixing bugs, refactoring legacy code, and implementing new features.
